title: ScheduleDef
description: A Half-Life schedule (ch02 §2.5): a condition-gated macro-behavior. Selection requires all Require conditions; any Interrupt condition invalidates it mid-run. The invalidation feedback loop is the reactivity — no event handlers.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

priority.description: Selection priority; higher wins among selectable schedules.

metaStates.description: Meta states ("Idle", "Alert") in which this schedule is selectable; empty = any.

require.description: Condition names that must all be set to select this schedule.

interrupt.description: Condition names whose appearance invalidates the running schedule.

items.description: A task primitive payload; see the manifest for arg signatures.
